channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Pathogenesis & Basic Science
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Pathogenesis & Basic Science

item.title: Ameliorative Effect and Mechanism of Huoxiang-Huanglian on TNBS-Induced Inflammatory Bowel Disease in Zebrafish.
item.description: Biomedical chromatography : BMC - The Huoxiang-Huanglian (HH) drug pair has demonstrated efficacy in treating enteritis, yet its underlying mechanisms remain unclear. We integrated UPLC-MS, network pharmacology, and metabolomics to...

item.title: Stiffness-dependent CMOT hydrogels promote mucosal repair in ulcerative colitis through YAP‑mediated mechanosensing in intestinal epithelial cells.
item.description: Journal of nanobiotechnology - In this study, a series of mechanically tunable CMOT hydrogels was successfully developed, which enable colon‑targeted delivery and controlled degradation via dynamic Schiff‑base cross‑linking. Amo...

item.title: CB2R promotes T cell gut homing and exacerbates ileitis in a murine Crohn's model.
item.description: Inflammatory bowel diseases - Leukocyte trafficking is a critical step in the development of chronic intestinal diseases such as Crohn's disease. While strategies that block gut homing have yielded partial success, this disease...

item.title: ST8Sia6-dependent glycosylation restrains gut inflammation and pathogenic Th1 and Th17 programs.
item.description: Cell reports - Inflammatory bowel diseases (IBDs), including ulcerative colitis (UC) and Crohn's disease (CD), are characterized by chronic inflammation of the gastrointestinal tract. Pathogenesis of IBD is multi...

item.title: Hederagenin Alleviates Ulcerative Colitis via Suppressing the Activation of EGFR/p38 MAPK Signaling.
item.description: Journal of gastroenterology and hepatology - Hederagenin (HDG) has been reported to attenuate the development of inflammatory diseases. Herein, we explored the functions and potential mechanisms of HDG on ulcerative colitis. We established an...

item.title: A "One-Stone-Three-Birds" Inspired Nanoplatform for Multitargeted Ulcerative Colitis Therapy via Combined Aryl Hydrocarbon Receptor Activation and Reactive Oxygen Species Scavenging.
item.description: Biomaterials research - In the pathogenesis of ulcerative colitis, inflammatory responses, mucosal injury, and gut dysbiosis form a mutually reinforcing network that perpetuates disease progression. Current clinical inter...

item.title: Drugst.One DREAM-Drug repurposing through expert annotation and modification.
item.description: British journal of pharmacology - Complex diseases often lack an actionable understanding of their underlying causal biological mechanisms, which leads to treating symptoms rather than causes. Network and systems medicine define di...

item.title: Lacticaseibacillus paracasei 18 effectively ameliorates dextran sodium sulfate-induced colitis in mice through regulating gut microbiota metabolite-mediated PI3K/AKT/NF-κB signaling pathway.
item.description: International immunopharmacology - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is a persistent inflammatory bowel disorder marked by mucosal inflammation and dysbiosis of the gut microbiome. Lacticaseibacillus paracasei 18 (LP18) is a versatile carbohy...

item.title: Isoliquiritigenin suppresses ER stress-driven epithelial apoptosis to preserve barrier integrity in colitis.
item.description: Toxicology and applied pharmacology - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is an inflammatory bowel disease characterized by epithelial barrier disruption and chronic mucosal inflammation, and its underlying mechanisms remain incompletely understoo...

item.title: Euphorbia humifusa Willd. alleviates ulcerative colitis by inhibiting lipid peroxidation via ACSL4/COX-2 axis.
item.description: Journal of ethnopharmacology - Herba Euphorbiae Humifusae (Euphorbia humifusa Willd., EH), named Dijincao, a traditional Chinese herbal medicine used to treat dysentery and enteritis, shows therapeutic potential for ulcerative c...

item.title: Effect of Intravesical Administration of Steroid Enemas on an Experimental Autoimmune Interstitial Cystitis-Like Mouse Model.
item.description: Neurourology and urodynamics - Interstitial cystitis/bladder pain syndrome (IC/BPS) is a chronic, non-bacterial cystitis presenting with bladder pain, frequent urination, and Hunner's lesions. Current therapies, including dimeth...

item.title: The Oxidative Stress Imbalance in Children and Adults with IBD and Associated Factors.
item.description: Nutrients - Background/Objectives: An imbalance in oxidative stress (OS) has been implicated in the pathogenesis of Inflammatory Bowel Disease (IBD). We compared OS status in IBD children and adults versus hea...

item.title: Eosinophil-Epithelial Cell Crosstalk at Mucosal Barriers: From Homeostatic Regulation to Disease Pathogenesis.
item.description: Cells - Review - Eosinophils are multifunctional granulocytes that reside constitutively within mucosal tissues, where they engage in bidirectional communication with the epithelial cells lining the respiratory and...

item.title: Empagliflozin Restores the Colonic Mucous Barrier by an AMPK/SOX4-Dependent Pathway in Glycogen Storage Disease Type Ib.
item.description: FASEB journal : official publication of the Federation of American Societies for Experimental Biology - Glycogen storage disease type Ib (GSD-Ib) is commonly associated with refractory inflammatory bowel disease (GSD-IBD). Although the SGLT2 inhibitor empagliflozin has demonstrated remarkable clinica...

item.title: Taoling Yuyang Decoction alleviates DSS-induced ulcerative colitis in mice by regulating gut microbiota -metabolite axis and restore intestinal barrier function.
item.description: Frontiers in microbiology - Traditional Chinese medicine (TCM) offers multi-targeted therapy with few side effects for ulcerative colitis (UC). Taoling Yuyang Decoction (TLYY) has shown clinical efficacy, however, its mechani...

item.title: Eupalinolide B alleviates ulcerative colitis by targeting HMGB1 through modulation of the HMGB1/TLR4/MyD88/NF-κB signaling pathway.
item.description: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is a chronic, relapsing inflammatory bowel disease with limited therapeutic options. Eupalinolide B (EB), a guaianolide sesquiterpene lactone derived from Eupatorium lindley...

item.title: Correction: Li et al. Cherry Polyphenol Extract Ameliorated Dextran Sodium Sulfate-Induced Ulcerative Colitis in Mice by Suppressing Wnt/β-Catenin Signaling Pathway. Foods 2022, 11, 49.
item.description: Foods (Basel, Switzerland) - In the original publication [...].
